Metadata.title: Gilam Market - Premium carpets in Uzbekistan
Metadata.description: Buy premium Turkish, Iranian and Uzbek carpets at Gilam Market. Wide range of sizes and modern or classic designs, delivered across Uzbekistan.
Metadata.ogTitle: Gilam Market - Premium carpets and runners online
Metadata.ogDescription: Discover Uzbekistan's best carpet collection. Turkish, Iranian, and locally made designs available online with home delivery.

About.title: About us - Gilam Market
About.description: Learn more about Gilam Market — a leading supplier of premium carpets in Uzbekistan offering a wide selection of Turkish, Iranian and Uzbek rugs.
About.body1: Welcome to our online carpet store — a place where quality, style and cosiness meet. We carry over 100 collections and 500 carpet models. Premium rugs from Turkey and Iran suit both modern and classical interiors.
About.cat1: Living room carpets — to create a warm and stylish atmosphere
About.cat2: Bedroom carpets — for extra cosiness and privacy
About.cat3: Kids' carpets — safe and colourful to delight your children
About.cat4: Outdoor carpets — durable and practical for terraces and balconies
About.body2: We strive to make choosing and buying a carpet as convenient as possible. Our consultants are always ready to help and answer any questions.
About.body3: With us you get more than a rug — a true piece of art that will delight you for years.
About.body4: We believe every home deserves to be cosy and stylish, and our store helps turn your dreams into reality.
About.body5: Thank you for choosing us. Your comfort is our top priority!

Delivery.title: Delivery - Gilam Market
Delivery.description: Fast and reliable carpet delivery across Uzbekistan. Read our delivery terms.
Delivery.body1: Thank you for shopping at our online carpet store. We truly appreciate your trust.
Delivery.body2: Delivery of your carpet takes place within 7 (seven) calendar days from order confirmation. We carefully oversee processing, packaging and transportation so every order arrives in proper condition and on time.
Delivery.body3Prefix: If you need to clarify delivery details, address, convenient time or have any additional questions, please contact us:
Delivery.body4: Our specialists will provide the required information and offer prompt support.
Delivery.body5: Thank you for choosing our store. We are confident your rugs will delight you with their quality, design and durability.
Delivery.body6: We look forward to a long-term partnership and are happy to welcome you among our regular customers.

Payment.title: Payment - Gilam Market
Payment.description: Secure payment methods for orders at Gilam Market. We accept various forms of payment.
Payment.body1: Thank you for placing an order at our online carpet store. We appreciate your choice and strive to keep payment conditions transparent and convenient for every customer.
Payment.body2Prefix: Payment is processed according to the method you chose. If the order lists cash on delivery, please call our operator at the time of receiving the goods:
Payment.body2Suffix: This call confirms the correctness of payment, verifies the order and clarifies any details.
Payment.body3: During the call with the operator you can verify that the amount, product and payment terms are correct, and receive information about return and exchange rules.
Payment.body4: Our company adheres to openness and honest interaction with customers. We do everything we can so the payment process is clear, safe and comfortable.
Payment.body5: Thank you for trusting our online store. We are glad to offer our customers quality carpet products and professional service.

Account.title: My account - Gilam Market
Account.description: Manage personal details and track your orders.
Account.consentIntro: By registering on our site, you confirm your agreement with our
Account.consentBody: These documents contain important information about how we protect your personal data, process information and govern the use of our service. We recommend reading them carefully before completing registration to be sure of the transparency and security of our interaction. Your trust and the protection of your data are our priority!

Basket.title: Basket - Gilam Market
Basket.description: Review the carpets you selected and complete your purchase.

Likes.title: Favourites - Gilam Market
Likes.description: All the carpets you liked in one place.

MyOrders.title: My orders - Gilam Market
MyOrders.description: History of all completed and pending orders.
MyOrders.questionsBody: If you want to know more about your order, contact our operators by phone.

Order.title: Checkout - Gilam Market
Order.description: Place your order and enter the delivery address.
Order.aboutBody: After placing the order a confirmation window will appear with a receipt. The order will also be available in the "My orders" section — you can share its number with an operator to check the status.
Order.prepaymentBody: If cash is chosen for an online order, a prepayment may be required to confirm it.
Order.prepaymentBody2: Once you receive the order number, contact an operator to clarify payment details. For more information reach out to an operator.
Order.contactModerator: To reach a moderator regarding order processing, call the number below or write via Telegram:
Order.paymentWarning: Once a payment method is chosen you must pay the specified way. Bargaining or changing conditions (including the cash option) is not allowed. The full total shown must be paid.
Order.promoHint: If you have a promo code, enter it here to receive a discount!
Order.addressWarning: Please double-check the delivery address. Once the order is placed, changing the address is not possible. An incorrect address may lead to extra delivery charges.

Home.heroTitle: Dive into a world of elegance!
Home.heroSubtitle: Turkish, Iranian and Uzbek carpets — only premium quality at affordable prices.

Profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

ChangePhone.title: Change phone
ChangePhone.success: Your phone number has been updated

OrderModal.info: Your order was sent successfully and will soon be picked up by a moderator. If you have any questions, feel free to contact them. We will do our best to deliver as fast as possible. Maximum delivery time — 7 days.
